name: mageaustralia/maho-module-b2b-bulk-order
description: Storefront bulk-order page for B2B customers. Grid of SKU + qty inputs, downloadable CSV template, paste / upload of multi-line SKU lists with non-matched-SKU report, ex-tax / inc-tax display toggle, and a Buy-Now-or-Send-as-Quote toggle on the finished cart (Send-as-Quote requires the b2b-rfq module).
